supporting_evidence: Duplicate: All 6 reused invoices confirmed via find_reused_invoices API with usage_count=2 each
Split: All 87 groups verified with valid 7-day windows (max span within 7 days), total >= 3000 AR-02 threshold

Over standard: All 6 records verified against correct policy standards - office_supplies 650>600, communication 330>300, travel_lodging D1+A 900>850, local_transport C 92>80, business_entertainment 350/person>300, training 3700>3500
Over budget: All 6 departments verified - trigger records all have special_approval=0, cumulative calculation confirmed correct
Overdue: All 6 records have delay_days > 60 (65, 72, 88, 95, 110, 120), boundary correctly applied
exceptions_or_boundaries: Overdue boundary: delay_days=60 (exactly 60 days) records are at the policy limit of '60天内' and NOT exceeding, correctly excluded from anomaly list
Office_supplies and communication: only single-transaction over-standard checked, monthly cumulative correctly excluded per task instructions
rationale: All 111 findings are supported by factual evidence from the database and correct policy citations. No false positives identified. Boundary conditions properly handled.
